title: Shadows of Brimstone Wrap Up - Final SOB Giveaway - What's Coming Up Next?
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=m9q3qhKxbk4

---

Daniel (@dungeondive) wraps up the Shadows of Brimstone deep-dive series with reflections on the game, a final giveaway, and a preview of upcoming channel content.

The love letter to the weird western genre runs deep — Daniel connects Shadows of Brimstone to the Merkabah Rider novels, splatter westerns like The Magpie Coffin, Lonesome Dove (which he calls "the American Lord of the Rings"), and films like Red Sun and The Master Gunfighter. Combined with hex crawl, the game becomes a delivery mechanism for stories — NPCs, persistent towns, and adventures that emerge organically from play.

His main criticism remains the sheer volume of content. If starting fresh, he'd be far more selective with purchases and skip sleeving cards entirely. The point of diminishing returns is real, and subset play is the antidote to overwhelm.

The final giveaway is a Ninja Clan deluxe enemy expansion for Patreon supporters at the Treasure Chamber tier. Daniel reiterates that the channel is 100% ad-free and sponsorship-free, sustained by patron support.

Coming next: Darker Darkest, Defenders of the Last Stand, Dream Wars, Siege of the Citadel (first vs second edition), the peculiar Talongard, and retro-styled oddities Return of the Heroes and Hero Path. New arrivals expected include Dungeons of Infinity, Chronicles of Drunagor, and Ghosts Betwixt.
